name: python3-openid
title: python3-openid
summary: Python3 OpenID package for modern servers and consumers
description:
Python3 OpenID package for modern servers and consumers
This is a set of Python packages to support use of the OpenID decentralized
identity system in your application.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-openid because Python3 OpenID package for modern servers and consumers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-openid as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-openid with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-openid --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
